---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're facing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Use Case

How would this feature fit into your workflow? How does it relate to the infinite canvas paradigm?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Mockups, references to similar features in other compositors, or any other context.
